faqs.answer: Any student who is interested in seeing the cut off for admission can check it on ILAM-JIMS's official website. Once the cutoff will be released, it will be uploaded on the website for the students to check. The student can check the cutoff according to which speciality he/she is applying for. No other source other than the official website should be trusted or relied upon. The institute does not upload cutoff on any other Website other than the official one.
faqs.question: Q: Where can a candidate find ILAM-JIMS cut off?

faqs.answer: To take admission at ILAM-JIMS for MBA program, a minimum cutoff of 75 percentile in order to enroll for the course is required. After that a final cutoff will be released based on the number of seats available and number of applications. If any student qualifies in the cutoff also, he/she can get the admission. Other than the entrance exam marks, a minimum of 50-55 percent in the graduation is also required in order to enroll for the program. So if any student wants to take admission, he/she should not only keep in mind the minimum cut off, but should try to get the best score in the entrance exam to get the admission without any problem.
faqs.question: Q: What are the cutoff marks required for MBA?

faqs.answer: At ILAM-JIMS, there is no entrance exam required for any course. If you want to get admission in MBA or PGDM courses, your score in undergrad is 50% and also 50% in standard 10+2. The eligibility criteria for BBA is that your score of 10+2 is 50%, and acceptable boards are CBSE and ISC. For the UG Diploma course, only 50% in 10+2.

reviews_list.review_title: I love my college because of its infrastructure and friendly faculty.

review_content.Placements: In St. Joseph Dental College (SJDC) there is no placements. After completion of the course, to be honest average salary for a dentist is 8-10k per month and it varies from place to place. For MS the salary was 3.6-4.8 lacs per annum. Our Alumni are working in top-most hospitals/clinics as Dentists.
review_content.Infrastructure: College was good with air-conditioned classrooms, the library was good, Parking area for day scholar students, Locker rooms, the stationery shop was available in college, No WI-FI. The hostel was good with 3 bedded/4 bedded rooms, common washrooms, paid laundry, housekeeping, mess availability. Sometimes, I didn't like hostel food, and basic amenities in hostel were not up to the mark.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied, but our college has to change a lot of things.

review_content.Placements: About 60% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package is offered in MS prosthodontist, while the average salary package is offered in endodontist. The lowest salary package is offered in oral pathology. Partha Dental clinics are top recruiting clinics for our course. Nowadays, in every city, Partha is opening a clinic. About 55% of the students from our course will get internships. Roles are offered as per the treatment.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are all types of equipment for us to learn, practice and examine. There are 8 departments in our course, and every department has separate labs. Classrooms are equipped with projectors, and the library is very spacious and peaceful to study. The hostel is just like other hostels. The food served is not much bad. Sports are conducted, and there are basketball and football court, so students who are interested will play. Medical facilities are available for almost 24 hours.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Everything was good in college, but for connectivity, there is no bus facility.

review_content.Placements: Our college didn't offer any placements, but passed out students are doing practice in most of the reputed hospitals or set-up their own clinic. Some of them are into PG, and some took other courses as their PG. The most important thing is the salary offered which was not up to the mark.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure, ambience, classrooms, labs, departments and faculty members were good. The college also provides a library, mess and sports ground. There is no college Wi-Fi, and the canteen was also not that good. For girls' hostel, security was strict, and getting outpass is difficult in odd times.

content.Placements: In St. Joseph Dental College (SJDC) there is no placements. After completion of the course, to be honest average salary for a dentist is 8-10k per month and it varies from place to place. For MS the salary was 3.6-4.8 lacs per annum. Our Alumni are working in top-most hospitals/clinics as Dentists.
content.Infrastructure: College was good with air-conditioned classrooms, the library was good, Parking area for day scholar students, Locker rooms, the stationery shop was available in college, No WI-FI. The hostel was good with 3 bedded/4 bedded rooms, common washrooms, paid laundry, housekeeping, mess availability. Sometimes, I didn't like hostel food, and basic amenities in hostel were not up to the mark.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied, but our college has to change a lot of things.

content.Placements: About 60% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package is offered in MS prosthodontist, while the average salary package is offered in endodontist. The lowest salary package is offered in oral pathology. Partha Dental clinics are top recruiting clinics for our course. Nowadays, in every city, Partha is opening a clinic. About 55% of the students from our course will get internships. Roles are offered as per the treatment.
content.Infrastructure: There are all types of equipment for us to learn, practice and examine. There are 8 departments in our course, and every department has separate labs. Classrooms are equipped with projectors, and the library is very spacious and peaceful to study. The hostel is just like other hostels. The food served is not much bad. Sports are conducted, and there are basketball and football court, so students who are interested will play. Medical facilities are available for almost 24 hours.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Everything was good in college, but for connectivity, there is no bus facility.

content.Placements: Our college didn't offer any placements, but passed out students are doing practice in most of the reputed hospitals or set-up their own clinic. Some of them are into PG, and some took other courses as their PG. The most important thing is the salary offered which was not up to the mark.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure, ambience, classrooms, labs, departments and faculty members were good. The college also provides a library, mess and sports ground. There is no college Wi-Fi, and the canteen was also not that good. For girls' hostel, security was strict, and getting outpass is difficult in odd times.
